title: Ontario Budget 2025: Permanent Gas Tax Cuts and 407 Toll Removal to Ease Cost of Living
content: As part of its 2025 Budget, the Ontario government is proposing permanent cuts to gas and fuel tax rates, saving households an average of 115 dollars annually, and removing tolls from the provincially owned section of Highway 407 East, which could save daily commuters up to 7200 dollars per year. These measures aim to ease cost of living pressures, support local businesses, and counter rising prices from US tariffs. Additional actions include eliminating licence plate renewal fees and freezing driver-related charges, bringing total household savings to over 1.8 billion dollars. The full budget will be released on May 15, 2025.
author: Analysts Account
